---
title: "30 Map Challenge"
output: html_document
---

The 30 Day Map Challenge typically takes place in November, but I decided to give it a go on my own time to dive into some R and ggplot mapping. Enjoy!

Inspiration: https://30daymapchallenge.com/

```{r globals and maps run, echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE,message=FALSE,include=FALSE}
library(here)
source(here('scripts/globals.R'))
source(here('scripts/map_01.R'))
source(here('scripts/map_02.R'))
```

## Map 1
For this map, the theme was displaying point data. I visualized the olympic venues in Vancouver for the 2010 Winter Olympics!

```{r map 1, echo=FALSE}
van_map1
```

## Map 2
Today's challenge required the use of lines like roads, rivers, flows, etc. I chose to map the city of Boston and its street level data to show all roads in the city.

```{r map 2, echo=FALSE}
bos_map
```
